title: March 9, 2015 – Sihasin
summary: Official SXSW 2014 Showcasing Artist “Sihasin” is the new musical project from siblings Clayson and Jeneda Benally of the band Blackfire. Sihasin is a Navajo word for hope and assurance, a meaning that comes alive in the duo’s energetic music. Taking from folk, rock, punk, and world music genres, th...
